title: jacquemontia verticillata
intro: Jacquemontia verticillata, also known as Five-angled Jacquemontia or Five-angle Jacquemontia, is a climbing vine native to tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Jacquemontia verticillata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
